name: Spriggan Hedger
description: Knotted as hawthorn, thin as a rake, swelling to wagon-size when roused.

features.name: Bramble Crown
features.description: Creatures who start their turn within Very Close must succeed on a Finesse Roll (11) or be Restrained until they clear a Stress or leave Very Close.

features.name: Field-Wide
features.description: Grow enormous until the end of the scene. While large, your standard attack becomes 1d12+4 and you count as impassable terrain to creatures without Flight.

features.name: Root-Trip
features.description: When a creature within Close moves away from you, mark a Stress to force an Agility Reaction Roll (11). On a failure, the creature is knocked back to Very Close and temporarily Vulnerable.
features.trigger: A creature within Close moves away from you

name: Redcap Millkeeper
description: A stump-limbed goblin in iron boots, cap forever wet with someone else's work.

features.name: Cap-Soaked
features.description: Track Soak (0-3). When the Redcap causes a target to mark HP, increase Soak by 1 (max 3). For each Soak, reduce physical damage taken by 1 (to a minimum of 1). Clearing all Stress wrings the cap dry (Soak 0).

features.name: Iron Stomp
features.description: Leap to a point within Very Close from above (beam, sill, railing). All targets within Very Close must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (11) or be knocked prone.

features.name: Red Rise
features.description: When you mark HP, you may mark a Stress to immediately move to Very Close of a different target and make a standard attack with disadvantage.
features.trigger: You mark HP

name: Púca Way-Maker
description: A moonlit trickster who leaves cloven tracks that point everywhere but truth. Their laugh sounds like a bell heard underwater.

features.name: Gleam of Elsewhere
features.description: Creatures beyond Very Close have disadvantage on Instinct Rolls to track or pursue the Púca.

features.name: Crossroads Coin
features.description: Toss a fae coin between you and a target within Close; place a Coin token there. Until the coin is picked up, you can spend a Fear to swap positions with any creature within Very Close of the token. A creature who picks it up marks a Stress.

features.name: Hollow Whinny
features.description: When you're missed by an attack within Close, become Hidden and move to Far.
features.trigger: Missed by an attack within Close

name: Leprechaun Covenant-Keeper
description: A pocket-lawyer of the sidhe who can notarize a deal with a wink.

features.name: Geas Coin
features.description: Hand (or flick) a shimmering coin to a target within Close. Until they return the coin or discard it publicly, the Leprechaun's attacks against them have advantage; if they willingly break a promise while holding it, they immediately become Vulnerable and mark a Stress.

features.name: Clause in Fine Print
features.description: When a PC spends Hope within Close, you may mark a Stress to force them to choose: their roll resolves normally, or they succeed but mark 1 HP.

features.name: Between Lines
features.description: When targeted by an attack beyond Very Close, step between the letters—move to Far after the roll resolves.
features.trigger: Targeted by an attack beyond Very Close

name: Kelpie Bridle-Taker
description: A river-horse glossy with weeds, eyes like peat lights.

features.name: Take the Bit
features.description: On a hit against a target within Very Close, place a Bridled condition. While Bridled, the target cannot voluntarily move farther than Close from the Kelpie and suffers disadvantage to escape grapples or restraints from the Kelpie. Breaking Bridled requires a Strength or Finesse Roll (14) as an action.

features.name: Slick Wake
features.description: The ground within Very Close of the Kelpie becomes Slippery; creatures entering it must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or fall prone.

features.name: River Claim
features.description: When the Kelpie is hit by a ranged attack, surge to Close with the attacker; if water is within Close, knock the attacker back to the water's edge.
features.trigger: The Kelpie is hit by a ranged attack

name: Selkie Tide-Post
description: A seal-souled courier with braided kelp sigils.

features.name: Kelp-Lashing
features.description: Cast a ribbon of weed at a target within Close. On a success, slide them up to Very Close toward the nearest water. The target marks 1 Stress.

features.name: Seal Skin
features.description: While in water or sprayed surf, gain resistance to physical damage and advantage on Agility Reaction Rolls.

features.name: Undertow Step
features.description: When hit by a melee attack, mark a Stress to slip beneath—move to Close (into water if possible) and become Hidden until your next attack.
features.trigger: Hit by a melee attack

name: Baobhan Sìth, Dance of Needles
description: Perfume like crushed ivy, steps like falling leaves. Her shadow pirouettes a heartbeat out of time.

features.name: White Ribbon
features.description: Place a Ribbon circle (Very Close radius) within Close. Creatures who enter or start in the circle must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll (14) or step toward the dancer (up to Very Close) and become Charmed. Charmed creatures have disadvantage on all Presence Reaction Rolls until they mark 2 Stress to break free.

features.name: Hollow Waltz
features.description: While inside the Ribbon circle, Baobhan Sìth is semi-corporeal (resistance to physical damage).

features.name: Sanguine Courtesy
features.description: When she causes a target within Very Close to mark HP, clear 1 Stress and the target must spend a Hope or become Vulnerable until their next action.
features.trigger: She causes a target within Very Close to mark HP

name: Fear Gorta, Hollow-Mouth
description: A famine saint and curse in the same coat. Crows perch on his shoulders to hear who is spared.

features.name: Empty Pantry
features.description: Choose a point within Close. Until cleared, that area becomes Withered: rations spoil, conjured food fails, and creatures who start there must mark a Stress unless they spend a Hope.

features.name: Alms or Ashes
features.description: The first time a PC refuses meaningful aid to a helpless NPC in the scene, increase this adversary's Difficulty by +2 until end of scene.

features.name: Eyes Like Winter
features.description: When a PC refuses aid or hoards supplies, mark a Stress to give that PC disadvantage on their next Presence or Instinct roll.
features.trigger: A PC refuses aid or hoards supplies

name: Cù Sìth, Hill's Shadow
description: Green-furred as moss, paws that make no sound, breath like heather smoke. It barks thrice when doom comes.

features.name: Three Barks (Countdown 3)
features.description: When first spotlighted, begin a Barks countdown that ticks down whenever a PC rolls with Fear. When it triggers, all targets within Close must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll (14) or lose a Hope and become Vulnerable until they clear a Stress.

features.name: Heather Lurch
features.description: Erupt from cover; move to Very Close and make a standard attack. On a success, also knock the target back to Close.

features.name: Grass-Wisp
features.description: When hit by a ranged attack, vanish into a flank—move to Close to the attacker and the attacker becomes Dizzied. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, then clear the condition.
features.trigger: Hit by a ranged attack

name: Clurichaun, Toastmaster of Chaos
description: Wine-wet whiskers, a corkscrew in the belt, a laugh that sets chairs on their hind legs.
motives: Start a fight with a cheer
Leave unpaid tabs in your name

features.name: A Cursed Toast!
features.description: Offer a toast to all within Close. Each target must choose: drink (mark a Stress and gain advantage on their next attack) or abstain (gain disadvantage on their next action). You gain a Fear for every two who drink.

features.name: Rolling Barrel
features.description: Mark a Stress to set a barrel rolling from Close to Far in a straight line, knocking back all in its path to Very Far unless they succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14).

features.name: Last Call
features.description: When reduced to 1 HP, you may spend a Fear to shatter every unattended bottle within Close; a fog of spirits fills the area (Lightly Obscured), creatures entering must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or become temporarily Vulnerable.
features.trigger: Reduced to 1 HP

name: Sluagh, Window-Swarm
description: A black storm of small souls that slip along lintels and eaves, pecking warmth from breath.

features.name: Horde (2d8+4)
features.description: When the Swarm has marked half or more of its HP, its standard attack deals 2d8+4 magic damage instead.

features.name: Through the Lintel
features.description: While at least one open window/door exists in the scene, the Sluagh may be spotlighted twice this GM turn, but the second spotlight can only move or use their standard attack.

features.name: Carry the Breath
features.description: When the Sluagh causes a target to mark HP, they may mark a Stress to also steal a gasp—target must spend a Hope or mark 1 Stress.
features.trigger: The Sluagh causes a target to mark HP

name: Each-Uisge, Lake's Devourer
description: Black as a windless lake, mane of eel-slick, mouth a cave of nails.
motives: Break the line by the shore

features.name: Mirror-Wake
features.description: When the Each-Uisge moves, it may leave behind a Mirror (Very Close pool) at its starting space. A creature who enters a Mirror must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll (17) or be knocked to Very Close of the Each-Uisge.

features.name: Saddle of Doom
features.description: On a hit against a target within Very Close, that target becomes Mounted unwillingly; while Mounted, they move with the Each-Uisge and are Restrained. Breaking free requires a Strength Roll (17) or spending 2 Hope.

features.name: Drag Below
features.description: When you cause a target to mark HP while you are in or adjacent to water, you may spend a Fear to deal an additional 1d10 direct magic damage.
features.trigger: You cause a target to mark HP while you are in or adjacent to water

name: Dullahan, Lantern of Names
description: A rider whose head watches from the saddle-bag, lantern light catching the true name in a throat.

features.name: Lantern Ledger
features.description: Track Names (0-3). When a PC fails a Presence or Instinct roll within Close, add 1 Name (max 3). When you make a standard attack, you may remove 1 Name to gain advantage and deal +1d6 damage.

features.name: Speak Doom
features.description: Choose a PC within Far and start a countdown (3). It ticks down each time any PC spends Hope. When it triggers, that PC takes Major damage unless the lantern is covered (a PC spends an action and marks a Stress within Very Close).

features.name: Ride the Barrow-Road
features.description: When you take damage, mark a Stress to switch places with a friendly Minion within Far (if any); that Minion takes the damage instead and is defeated.
features.trigger: You take damage

name: Dearg Due, Grave-Bride
description: A lover's promise unkept, veiled in grave-dirt lace. Her ring is a circle no one should step inside.

features.name: Ring of Earth
features.description: Scribe a grave-ring (Very Close radius) on the ground within Close. Creatures inside the ring count as In a Wake: the Dearg Due's attacks against them deal an additional +1d6 damage and she has resistance to physical damage from them. Leaving the ring requires spending a Hope or succeeding on a Strength Roll (17).

features.name: Taste of Promise
features.description: When she causes a target within Very Close to mark HP, she clears 1 HP.

features.name: Kiss Goodnight
features.description: When a target within Very Close becomes Vulnerable, make a standard attack with advantage against that target.
features.trigger: A target within Very Close becomes Vulnerable

name: Banshee, Keener of Tumbled Stones
description: Her hair is the grass that grows on cairns; her mouth is a winter valley. She sings the order of dying.

features.name: Foretold Cry
features.description: Choose a point within Far and begin a countdown (2). It ticks down when a PC moves toward that point. When it triggers, unleash a cone from that point (Close) that makes an attack against all in the area; targets you succeed against take 3d8+4 magic and are knocked to Far.

features.name: Stone-Quiet
features.description: While adjacent to natural stone, the Banshee has advantage on attacks and Instinct Reactions.

features.name: Echo Among the Cairns
features.description: When attacked from beyond Close, mark a Stress to reappear adjacent to a different stone feature within Far (if any) and the attack targets your former space.
features.trigger: Attacked from beyond Close

name: Aos Sí High Lord, Bearer of Glamour
description: A blade like sunlight in water, a cloak like a dusk moth's wing.

features.name: Royal Decree
features.description: Spend a Fear to reorder the battlefield: spotlight up to 1d4 allies within Far and place each anywhere within Close of their current position; each gains advantage on their next attack.

features.name: Court Summons
features.description: Summon Minions equal to the party size within Close; if any end a turn within Very Close of the High Lord, he clears 1 Stress.

features.name: Circle of Challenge
features.description: When a PC deals Major or greater damage to an ally within Close, mark a Stress to draw a Duel Circle around the PC and High Lord (Very Close). Until the end of the PC's next turn, attacks that don't include either duelist have disadvantage.
features.trigger: A PC deals Major or greater damage to an ally within Close

name: Cailleach, Winter's Hand
description: Old as the first frost on stone, she carries cairn-stones in a shawl and counts the years in broken rivers.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Cailleach can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual.

features.name: Freeze the Breath
features.description: Spend a Fear to attack all targets within Close. On success, targets take 4d6 magic and must choose: lose a Hope or be Restrained in rime until they clear a Stress.

features.name: The Year Turns
features.description: When reduced below half HP the first time, begin Slow Winter: while active, you must be spotlighted twice before each action (place/clear a token), but your standard attack deals +1d10.
features.trigger: Reduced below half HP the first time

name: Balor, The Blighted Eye
description: A titan in rusted bronze. The chained eye under his brow is a sunrise no land survives.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: Balor can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Seal Strains (Countdown 3)
features.description: Each time Balor takes damage from Far or a PC spends Hope, tick the countdown. When it triggers, immediately use Open the Eye. Reset the countdown.

features.name: Open the Eye
features.description: Spend a Fear to project a Far line. Make an attack against all along the line; targets you succeed against take 4d10+10 magic and are knocked to Very Far. Squares scorched become Ash Furrows (Dangerous).

features.name: Chain-Drag
features.description: When a creature ends their turn at Far, drag the chain: move Balor up to Close toward them and knock them to Close of Balor.
features.trigger: A creature ends their turn at Far

name: Morrígan's Phantom Host
description: A cycling murder of crows and war-shades, armor made from tomorrow's carrion.
motives: Leave a field of choices no one wanted

features.name: Horde (2d10+10)
features.description: When the Host marks half or more HP, their standard attack becomes 2d10+10 magic.

features.name: Bad Omen
features.description: Whenever a PC within Far rolls a failure with Fear, place an Omen on them. When the Host next attacks, you may remove any Omen to gain +1d6 damage per Omen and knock those targets back to Far.

features.name: Carrion Augury
features.description: When a PC is reduced to 0 HP or loses their last Hope, you may mark a Stress to immediately spotlight the Host again.
features.trigger: A PC is reduced to 0 HP or loses their last Hope

name: Fomorian Curse-Reaver, Eye of Spite
description: A giant whose breath smells of bad iron and storm graves. One eye curses; the other pities and never wins.

features.name: Ruin-Field
features.description: The first time the Reaver strikes a target each round, choose ground within Very Close; it becomes Rubble: difficult and hazardous (entering creatures make an Agility Reaction Roll (18) or mark a Stress).

features.name: Eye-Bite
features.description: Spend a Fear to curse a target within Far until the end of the scene. While cursed, whenever that target spends Hope, they also mark a Stress.

features.name: Smash the Sigil
features.description: When a PC critically succeeds within Close, the Reaver marks a Stress to shatter an ongoing magical effect or summoned minion in Close (GM adjudication).
features.trigger: A PC critically succeeds within Close
